title: Decisioning Content
description: A content field used in decisioning, containing a content type and content value.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/decision.title: Content Type
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/decision.description: The media type of the content. Indicates how the content value should be interpreted.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/decision.title: Content
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/decision.description: The content string. The format is determined by the contentType property.
